The default interactive shell is now zsh.
To update your account to use zsh, please run `chsh -s /bin/zsh`.
For more details, please visit https://support.apple.com/kb/HT208050.
Maartens-MacBook-Pro:~ mderickx$ magma
Magma V2.26-10    Sun Aug 20 2023 15:52:43 on Maartens-MacBook-Pro [Seed =
2585584869]

+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
|       This copy of Magma has been made available through a        |
|                   generous initiative of the                      |

Type ? for help.  Type <Ctrl>-D to quit.
> M_2 := ModularSymbols(Gamma1(16));
> S_2 := CuspidalSubspace(M_2);
> phi := RationalMapping(S_2);
>
> positive_rank := [];
> for d in [1..5000] do
for>     if not IsSquarefree(d) then continue; end if;
for>     printf "d=%o\n", d;
for>     chi := KroneckerCharacter(d,Rationals());
for>     w := phi(TwistedWindingElement(S_2,1,chi));
for>    if w eq 0 then
for|if>         print "positive_rank" , d, d mod 8;
for|if>         Append(~positive_rank, d);
for|if>     end if;
for> end for;
d=1
